description_long: This is a rectangular, deep, single-basin sink with a dark, stone-like finish, commonly found in utility or public urban environments. The sink features a prominent, horizontally mounted faucet with two separate control knobs for hot and cold water, positioned at the rear edge of the basin. The faucet spout extends over the center of the basin, and the knobs are symmetrically placed on either side. The basin itself is smooth and slightly rounded at the corners, with a visible drain located centrally at the bottom. The overall design is utilitarian, with robust, clean lines and a matte, slightly speckled surface texture. There are no visible overflow holes, and the mounting style suggests it is intended for drop-in installation.
description: A deep, rectangular, single-basin sink with a dark stone-like finish, featuring a central faucet and two control knobs. The design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban or utility settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the basin, the faucet spout, and both control knobs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the basin and the horizontal extension of the faucet spout over the sink.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the basin and the alignment of the faucet and knobs, with less detail on the spout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and the faucet's extension, mirroring view 1 from the other side.
